home.title: Premium car rental in Morocco
home.description: Premium car rental in Morocco with guaranteed models, no hidden fees, airport and downtown agencies, 24/7 support and a multilingual booking experience.

b2b.title: B2B Area | Hire Automotive Group
b2b.description: Corporate booking, approvals and B2B reservation tracking on Hire Automotive Group.

reservation.title: Vehicle reservation | Hire
reservation.description: Start your reservation journey, recover your cart, and continue the checkout flow step by step.

agencies.title: Our branches in Morocco
agencies.description: Browse the agencies returned by the current back-end API.

fleet.title: Fleet and availability
fleet.description: Vehicle catalog and availability search powered only by already exposed back-end endpoints.

auth.title: Login and account creation
auth.description: Customer authentication connected to the already exposed /auth routes.

account.title: My account
account.description: Customer profile and reservations loaded from exposed endpoints.

lookup.title: Reservation lookup
lookup.description: Inspect a reservation using the currently exposed endpoints.

HomeHero.description: Premium car rental. European standards, transparent pricing, and your exact vehicle — guaranteed.

WhyChoose.description: The quality of an international agency, with expert local knowledge.

hiddenFees.title: No hidden fees
hiddenFees.description: The displayed price is the paid price. Full transparency at every step.

airport.title: Airport Fast Track
airport.description: Pick up your keys in under 5 minutes after arrival.

premiumFleet.title: Premium fleet
premiumFleet.description: Recent vehicles maintained according to manufacturer standards.

guaranteedModel.title: Guaranteed model
guaranteedModel.description: You book this exact model — not an equivalent.

support.title: 24/7 support
support.description: An advisor is available anytime to assist you.

cities.title: 7 covered cities
cities.description: Available in major Moroccan airports and city centers.

oneWay.title: One-way rental
oneWay.description: Pick up in Casablanca, return in Marrakech. Available on request.

invoice.title: Business invoice
invoice.description: Compliant documents for your professional expense reports.

Footer.description: Premium car rental in Morocco. Guaranteed vehicles, zero hidden fees, and a service designed for a premium experience.
Footer.copyright: © 2026 Hire Automotive Group. All rights reserved.

Common.badgeFast: Search stays at the top of the site
Common.badgeSeo: Structure ready for SEO and translations

HomePage.title: Rent faster with a clean, multilingual front-end built for SEO.
HomePage.subtitle: This foundation follows the Next.js architecture you requested so you can manage translations, metadata and further front-end work while consuming only the APIs currently exposed by your back-end.
HomePage.agencyFallback: Detailed agency content can be enriched later as your back-end exposes more data.

SearchBox.title: Find a vehicle
SearchBox.subtitle: The search box stays at the beginning of the site to match your product requirement.
SearchBox.invalidDateRange: Return date must be after or equal to pickup date.

FleetPage.title: Catalog and availability
FleetPage.empty: No vehicles found for the current criteria.

ReservationFlow.title: Your reservation
ReservationFlow.subtitle: The flow now starts correctly from the fleet page. This step lets the user choose a pricing plan and save it into the cart.
ReservationFlow.genericError: An error occurred while initializing the checkout flow.
ReservationFlow.missingParams: Required parameters are missing. Please restart from the fleet page.
ReservationFlow.pricingSubtitle: Select the pricing plan that fits your booking.
ReservationFlow.pricingCardFooter: The full price details will be recalculated before the next step.
ReservationFlow.pricingSelectionRequired: Please select a pricing plan before continuing.
ReservationFlow.pricingSaveError: Unable to save the selected pricing.
ReservationFlow.pricingSavedSuccess: The pricing was saved successfully and the first price calculation was retrieved.
ReservationFlow.guestMode: No logged-in account was detected. Customer details will be entered later in the flow.
ReservationFlow.protectionSubtitle: Select your insurance and your extra options.
ReservationFlow.optionsSubtitle: Add the services that fit your booking.
ReservationFlow.protectionSaveError: Unable to save protection and extras.
ReservationFlow.protectionSavedSuccess: Protection and extras were saved successfully.
ReservationFlow.pricingFirstRequired: Please select a pricing plan first.
ReservationFlow.detailsSubtitle: Fill in your customer information and booking details.
ReservationFlow.detailsSaveError: Unable to save customer and booking details.
ReservationFlow.detailsSavedSuccess: Customer and booking details were saved successfully.
ReservationFlow.finalReviewSubtitle: Check your order details before the final step.
ReservationFlow.finalizedSubtitle: Your cart has been finalized and is waiting for payment.

ageDescriptions.young: Young driver (21–24 years) — surcharge of 80 MAD / day
ageDescriptions.senior: Senior driver (66–75 years) — surcharge of 80 MAD / day

ReservationFlow.ageRequirementsNote: You must be between 18 and 75 years old to rent.

AgenciesPage.title: Our branches
AgenciesPage.subtitle: This page is wired directly to the existing /agences endpoint, with no extra back-end adaptation.

AuthPage.title: Customer login
AuthPage.subtitle: Sign in or create your account to access your bookings and customer space.
AuthPage.countryHelp: The suggested dial code for this country is {dialCode}, but you can still edit it.

AccountPage.title: My account
AccountPage.subtitle: Connected profile and reservations overview loaded from already exposed endpoints.
AccountPage.loginRequired: You need to sign in first to view your account.
AccountPage.deleteAccountMessage: This action is permanent. Your account will be deleted via the API and you will be signed out.

ReservationsPage.title: My reservations
ReservationsPage.loginRequired: Sign in to view your reservations.

ReservationLookupPage.title: Reservation lookup
ReservationLookupPage.subtitle: This page queries /reservations/:id directly. When the reservation belongs to a guest cart session, you can also provide x-session-id.

B2BPage.title: B2B Area
B2BPage.subtitle: This area lets authenticated collaborators track company reservations, pending approvals and history.
B2BPage.loginRequired: You must be logged in to access the B2B area.
B2BPage.notB2B: Your account is authenticated but no active company profile was found.
B2BPage.reserveIntro: B2B booking will rely on your active company context. In the next step, we will add the full form with agency or map point, vehicle selection, quote and reservation creation.
B2BPage.reserveNextStep: Next step: full B2B booking form with agency / map point selection, vehicle, quote and reservation creation.
B2BPage.emptyHistory: No approval or rejection history found.
B2BPage.historyNote: This view currently displays history inferred from your B2B reservations. A complete history of already processed approvals as validator can be added later if a dedicated backend endpoint is created.
B2BPage.reserveFlowIntro: Select departure and return by agency or map, choose dates, fetch available vehicles, request a B2B quote and create the reservation.
B2BPage.selectDepartureOnMap: Choose departure point on the map
B2BPage.selectReturnOnMap: Choose return point on the map
B2BPage.mapCoordinatesInfo: The selected city automatically feeds the coordinates sent to the B2B API.
